REMARK: AS TO THE JUN-21-24 PLAINTIFF'S EX PARTE MOTION UNDER CCP 2025.210 FOR LEAVE TO SERVE SUBPOENAS UNDER CCP 2020.410, THE COURT DENIES THE REQUEST WITHOUT PREJUDICE, AS THE REQUEST IS OVERBROAD. THE COURT SETS THE MOTION FOR HEARING ON JUL-01-2024, AT 9:00 A.M. IN DEPARTMENT 302. THE EX PARTE PAPERS SHALL BE THE MOVING PAPERS. JUDGE: ROCHELLE C. EAST; CLERK: V. DA FONSECA; NOT REPORTED. (302/RCE)

PLAINTIFF FION YAU'S MOTION UNDER CCP 2025.210 FOR LEAVE TO SERVE SUBPOENAS UNDER CCP 2020.410
Off Calendar Jul-02-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: RE: PLAINTIFF FION YAU'S MOTION UNDER CCP 2025.210 FOR LEAVE TO SERVE SUBPOENAS UNDER CCP 2020.410.

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Bennet Kelly, Esq., of INTERNET LAW CENTER LTD., (310) 452-0401, for Plaintiff.
No other appearances.

Not argued/contested. The court adopts its tentative ruling. Motion granted. Subpoenas may be served on Sau-Wing Lam. Mr. Lam reserves all rights to object to the subpoenas. The subpoenas shall be limited to communications regarding Plaintiff.

Judge Pro Tem: David McDonald. Clerk: R. Woods. Not Reported. (302/JPT)
